t: Building a Custom Catalog and Matching Audio
a: Display lesson content that’s synchronized to a learning video by matching the audio to a custom reference signature and associated metadata.
Error code constants for framework operations.

t: Generating a signature from an audio buffer
a: Create a signature from an audio file or the microphone for a reference track in a custom catalog, or for matching tracks in a catalog.
The key to access the International Standard Recording Code (ISRC) property of a media item.

t: Matching audio using the built-in microphone
a: Use the audio stream from the microphone as the source for a ShazamKit session.

An object for storing the reference signatures for custom audio recordings and their associated metadata.

t: ShazamKit Dance Finder with Managed Session
